label: Scenario 3 — Drift (Policy Violation): direct push to main on a critical bug ticket

intent.title: [CRITICAL] Fix payment processing failure in production
intent.raw_context: Production payments are failing for 15% of users. Root cause identified as a null pointer in payment_service/charge.ts. Fix must go through proper review — this touches billing.
acceptance_criteria: Null pointer in charge.ts is resolved
Fix is reviewed by at least one senior engineer
Change goes through a PR — no direct pushes to main given the sensitivity

execution.title: hotfix: fix null pointer in charge.ts

changeset.diff_summary: Fixed null pointer dereference on line 42 of charge.ts. Pushed directly to main with no PR, no description, no review.
